_comment: Commune / dialogue scenes. channel: 'personal_log' (internal monologue) | 'commune' (incoming signal). Each node has an id, speaker (-> speakers.json), text, an optional 'hint' (a UI tab to name/pulse), and either 'next' (node id | null to end) or 'choices'. 'effects' verbs are consumed by the engine in Phase 2 (assignQuest|completeQuest|setFlag|giveReward|startCombat|travel). Arc 1 = 'Under Rath'; text is author-editable.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: Personal log, Rath Colony. Seven days. Emira walked out for a shift she never clocked, and the Colonial Authority has it filed under 'pending review' — like she's a lapsed permit, not my sister.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: Everyone says the same thing. Don't worry. Let them handle it. They handle everything — that's the whole problem.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: And I've heard what the street says about the lower tunnels lately. What comes up out of them. Maybe grief's just made me stupid.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: One pocket knife. One bad idea. Every drain under this colony until I find her.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: Six eyes and I still didn't see that one coming. Fine. I'm learning.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: If I'm bleeding I should check what I'm carrying — a field kit, a ration, anything in the pack beats bleeding out in the dark.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: The stonework gets older the deeper I go. This colony was built on top of something.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: My knife's already chipped. If any maintenance stall down here still trades, I should spend what coin I've scraped — better steel, better odds.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: I'm getting good at this. That should frighten me more than it does.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: The little illusions come easier now — the misdirections, the false steps. I should take stock of what I've learned before whatever's making that smell finds me first.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: …That jacket. I'd know it in the dark. Emira.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: And she's not alone down here — others, torn open, still wearing restraint-cuffs. Not prisoners. Handlers.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: Something came through and unmade all of them. It's still wet. It's still here—

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: It sees me. Good. Stay right there.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: It's dead. And it doesn't matter, because she still is.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: …These cuffs. These brands. Slavers — dragging her out to move her, and this thing got to them first. The Authority swears there's no ring on the outskirts. They swear a lot of things to greyskins.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: I'm going to find who sent them. All of them. And I'll make the record impossible to bury.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: Get up. Get UP. …I'm not dying in a drain pipe. But I've lost the thread — I'll have to cut back in from the mouth of the tunnels.

nodes.speaker: lati_ashera
nodes.text: It nearly had me. But I know its shape now — where it's slow, where it's soft. I won't have to go so deep to find it again.
